replica identity rejects deferrable unique indexes
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE replica_identity_deferrable_items
						REPLICA IDENTITY USING INDEX replica_identity_deferrable_items_code_key;

assertions.scriptName: replica identity rejects deferrable unique indexes
replica identity rejects deferrable unique indexes
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_index i
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class c ON c.oid = i.indrelid
						WHERE c.relname = 'replica_identity_deferrable_items'
						  AND i.indisreplident;

assertions.scriptName: replica identity index columns must remain not null
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE replica_identity_not_null_items
						ALTER COLUMN code DROP NOT NULL;

assertions.scriptName: replica identity index columns must remain not null
assertions.query:
SELECT a.attnotnull, c.relreplident, i.indisreplident
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute a
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class c ON c.oid = a.attrelid
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_index i ON i.indrelid = c.oid
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class ic ON ic.oid = i.indexrelid
						WHERE c.relname = 'replica_identity_not_null_items'
						  AND a.attname = 'code'
						  AND ic.relname = 'replica_identity_not_null_items_code_idx';

assertions.scriptName: replica identity using index survives table rename
assertions.query:
SELECT c.relreplident, count(*) FILTER (WHERE i.indisreplident)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_index i ON i.indrelid = c.oid
						WHERE c.relname = 'replica_identity_rename_new'
						GROUP BY c.relreplident;

assertions.scriptName: replica identity is cleared when table is dropped
replica identity using index survives index rename
assertions.query:
SELECT c.relreplident, ic.relname, i.indisreplident
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_index i ON i.indrelid = c.oid
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class ic ON ic.oid = i.indexrelid
						WHERE c.relname = 'replica_identity_index_rename_items'
						  AND ic.relname = 'replica_identity_index_rename_new_idx';

assertions.scriptName: DELETE requires replica identity when publication publishes deletes

assertions.scriptName: DELETE requires replica identity when publication publishes deletes
assertions.query: SELECT count(*) FROM publication_delete_identity;

assertions.scriptName: UPDATE requires replica identity when publication publishes updates
assertions.query: UPDATE publication_update_identity SET label = 'after-update' WHERE id = 1;

assertions.query: SELECT label FROM publication_update_identity WHERE id = 1;
